title: delphinium variegatum subsp. kinkiense
intro: Delphinium variegatum subsp. kinkiense, also known as Japanese delphinium or Kinki delphinium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Delphinium variegatum subsp. kinkiense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. Delphinium variegatum subsp. kinkiense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile medicinal plant with potential therapeutic applications.
